title: campanula balcanica f. divaricata
intro: Campanula balcanica f. divaricata, also known as the Balkan bellflower, is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula balcanica f. divaricata include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Campanula balcanica f. divaricata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
